1.acrostic: SON RISES AND, NEW APOSTLE NAMED

2.acrostic: PENTECOST FIRE, COMPELS PETER TO WITNESS AND MANY, JOIN IN

4.acrostic: RULERS STOP PETER AND JOHN, BUT THEY GO, UNITED

5.acrostic: INSTANT DOOM, SIGNS, AND AN ANGEL FREES THE APOSTLES

7.acrostic: BOLDLY STEPHEN SHARES ISRAEL'S HISTORY NEAR SAUL UNTIL DEATH BY, STONING

8.acrostic: OUT,SIDER, SIMON WANTS INSIDER, SPIRIT TO BAPTIZE

9.acrostic: ROAD TO DAMASCUS MOVES, SAUL TO PREACH; TABITHA AROSE

10.acrostic: NAB PETER, AS HE SEES A VISION, SO GENTILES HEAR THE GOOD NEWS

12.acrostic: HOW PETER IS SAVED FROM, DEMISE

13.acrostic: USE, BLINDNESS, PREACHING SALVATION THROUGH JESUS TO GENTILES

14.acrostic: REFUSED, A LAME MAN WALKS, PREACHED

15.acrostic: CIRCUMCISE THE GENTILES, COUNCIL'S LETTER, PARTED

16.acrostic: HELPS, READY, LYDIA, SLAVE GIRL, FREE JAILER, ROMANS

17.acrostic: BIBLE RIOT, PUSHES, PAUL TO, THE UNKNOWN GOD

19.acrostic: APOSTLE PAUL IN EPHESUS, SPARKS A RIOT OVER THE WAY

20.acrostic: REVIVAL OF YOUNG MAN AND PAUL'S FINAL FAREWELL

21.acrostic: SOLDIERS ARREST PAUL DURING A RIOT IN JERUSALEM

23.acrostic: IN THE MIDDLE OF THE NIGHT PAUL IS ESCORTED

27.acrostic: STRANDED ON MALTA AFTER SHIPWRECK ON THE WAY TO ITALY

28.acrostic: SICK HEALED AND PAUL PREACHES IN ROME
